local_sources: Financial spreadsheets, CSV files and report configuration
local_processing: Prepare chart data and report diagnostics

Remove known local-path fields, known absolute path occurrences, and private QA text from the browser payload served through the loopback workbench, and require a per-session token for write operations

codex_context.purpose: Resolve reporting structure and explain results
codex_context.content: Schema, aggregate tables, calculated metrics, chart-ready summaries, diagnostics and user instructions
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use calculated and aggregated reporting tables; inspect raw rows only for a targeted data-quality issue

residual_risks.risk: Small aggregates or targeted diagnostics can still reveal case-specific business information
residual_risks.mitigation: Prefer aggregated reporting tables and limit raw-row inspection to explicit data-quality exceptions

commercialista_notice.message_it: I file finanziari vengono trasformati e calcolati localmente. Codex lavora normalmente su tabelle aggregate, metriche e diagnostica; consulta righe di dettaglio solo per anomalie mirate.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Financial files are transformed and calculated locally. Codex normally works from aggregate tables, metrics and diagnostics, consulting detailed rows only for targeted anomalies.

limitations: The user's requested report granularity determines whether detailed rows are necessary
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
